nodes.name: Chatham Islands gerygone
nodes.summary: Chatham Islands gerygone（Chatham Islands gerygone，学名 Gerygone albofrontata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括温带森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 温带森林
nodes.summary: 温带岛屿或山地森林生态系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is temperate forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although thought to be decreasing, the population numbers have not yet reduced enough to be classified as vulnerable by the IUCN and it is thus categorised as "least concern" on the red list of threatened species. Although this is the case, a recovery plan has been in place in New Zealand due to habitat loss
